nasb.text: Like a cage full of birds, So their houses are full of deceit; Therefore they have become great and rich.

esv.text: Like a cage full of birds, their houses are full of deceit; therefore they have become great and rich;

cnv.text: 籠中怎樣滿了雀鳥， 他們的屋裡也滿了詭詐； 他們就因此財雄勢大。

ccb.text: 他们的家里充满了诡诈， 就像笼子装满了鸟。 他们变得有财有势，
